chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1150 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4335/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4336/2022 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 07.09.2023 None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Since 10.09.2022 the date of filing of this petition, the petitioners and their counsel never appeared before this Court to pursue this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
